name: OmopPractitionerProviderView
title: Practitioner → provider (flat)
description: Individual healthcare provider. One FHIR Practitioner maps to one OMOP provider row. The provider table stores identity (name, NPI, gender, year_of_birth) from Practitioner; specialty and care_site are enriched by PractitionerRole. Clinical event tables carry provider_id FK back to this row.

column.name: provider_id
column.description: Surrogate key. Hash/sequence/lookup of Practitioner.id. Every provider with a different unique identifier is a different person.

column.name: provider_name
column.description: omoponfhir uses "family, given" (lines 337-354). fhir-x-omop uses "{given} {family}" (line 13). Pick one convention and document. — transform: format("{family}, {given}")

column.name: npi
column.description: National Provider Identifier issued by CMS. fhir-x-omop filters identifiers by NPI system (lines 15-21).

column.name: specialty_concept_id
column.description: Fallback only. Primary source is PractitionerRole.specialty[0] (see PractitionerRole__provider edge). fhir-x-omop falls back to qualification[0].code.coding[0].code (line 31). Default 0 when no PractitionerRole exists.

column.name: care_site_id
column.description: Fallback only when no PractitionerRole.organization link exists. omoponfhir creates a care_site from Practitioner.address (lines 358-375). Primary source is PractitionerRole.organization (see PractitionerRole__provider edge).

column.name: year_of_birth
column.description: Year component only. fhir-x-omop extracts via int(x.split('-')[0]) (line 30). — transform: year(Practitioner.birthDate)

column.name: gender_concept_id
column.description: Same mapping as Patient: male->8507, female->8532, other->8521, unknown->8551, absent->0.

column.name: gender_source_value
column.description: Verbatim gender code as it appears in source data. fhir-x-omop uppercases the value (line 29).

column.name: specialty_source_value
column.description: Fallback only when no PractitionerRole exists. Primary source is PractitionerRole.specialty[0] (see PractitionerRole__provider edge). fhir-x-omop falls back to qualification[0].code (line 31).

column.name: provider_source_value
column.description: NPI or first identifier value. Use this field to link back to providers in the source data for ETL error checking. omoponfhir uses identifierFirstRep.value (lines 388-392). fhir-x-omop uses Practitioner.id (line 26).
